---
title: "UIAO-core Value Proposition — Two-Way Governance Architecture for SCuBA and BOD 25-01"
subtitle: "Canonical Spec · UIAO_005"
date: 2026-04-18
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical UIAO Specification

**UIAO_005** — status: **Current** — version: **1.0**

This page renders the canonical UIAO_005 source verbatim. The
authoritative source is at
[`src/uiao/canon/UIAO_005_SCuBA_Value_Proposition_v1.0.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/UIAO_005_SCuBA_Value_Proposition_v1.0.md).
A customer-audience narrative summary is at
[SCuBA Value Proposition (customer doc)](../customer-documents/compliance/evidence-telemetry/scuba-value-proposition.qmd).
Per [ADR-072](../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd), this
canonical page is generated as an `include`-style wrapper.
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/UIAO_005_SCuBA_Value_Proposition_v1.0.md >}}
